reference: FOR WHEN ZARATHUSTRA SCRUTINISED HIM WITH HIS GLANCE HE WAS FRIGHTENED AS BY A SUDDEN APPARITION SO SLENDER SWARTHY HOLLOW AND WORN OUT DID THIS FOLLOWER APPEAR
text: Who, when there too stress, scrutinized him; with his glance he was frightened, as by a sudden apparition. So slender, swarthy, hollow, and worn out did his follower appear.
